nasb.text: “Go up through her vine rows and destroy, But do not execute a complete destruction; Strip away her branches, For they are not the Lord’s.

esv.text: “Go up through her vine rows and destroy, but make not a full end; strip away her branches, for they are not the Lord’s.

cnv.text: “你們要走進她的葡萄園裡施行毀壞， 但不可毀滅淨盡，要除掉她的枝子， 因為它們不屬耶和華。

ccb.text: 你们要去毁坏她的葡萄园， 但不可彻底毁坏。 要砍掉枝子， 因为那些枝子不属于耶和华。
